task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ManageEngine ADAudit Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus main dashboard or internal application interface is visible, indicating the agent bypassed the login screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Logon Settings page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Logon Settings' page is active. The browser URL should end with '#/admin/logon-settings' or the page header should clearly display 'Logon Settings'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Session Expiry Time is set to 20 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field for 'Session Expiry Time' contains the value '20'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Account Lockout Threshold is set to 3 invalid attempts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field for 'Account Lockout Threshold' (or 'Invalid Attempts') contains the value '3'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Account Lockout Duration is set to 30 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field for 'Account Lockout Duration' contains the value '30'.

task_completion.description: Verify the changes to the Logon Settings were saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message or toast notification (e.g., 'Settings saved successfully') is visible on the screen, or the 'Save' button is shown being clicked with the correct values present.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a standard web browser interface being used to navigate and fill out forms, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ADAudit Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus software, not a text editor, local file, or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) pane is not open in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct URL for the Logon Settings page is http://localhost:8081/webclient/index.html#/admin/logon-settings. The expected values to be verified in the input fields are: Session Expiry Time = 20, Account Lockout Threshold = 3, and Account Lockout Duration = 30.
